creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
If you are looking for another tester (for EliteBooks with pointing sticks), you don't need to look for the 9470m explicitly. Any EliteBook not in the 1000 series or the Revolve 810 can be used in place of the 9470m. Other models such as the 8470p, 2570p, and 840 probably has this issue also. I'm saying 'probably' because I don't have access to other EliteBooks as I'm not an IT professional, my college internship is not in IT, and where I work, it's not at all a HP shop.

Keep in mind that the issue with the 9470m was also on the 2570p which I gave away as well, and I can continue to test for the 1040 G1 as long as I have this laptop.
